fields.acceptance_criteria: genai-based provider abstraction routes to OpenAI/Anthropic/OpenRouter by env; deterministic .agentguidance layering (repo<path<session, most-specific wins) with recorded overrides; preflight budget+policy hooks run before expensive calls and block over-budget loops with resumable checkpoint.
fields.title: [agent-harness][CH3] Provider abstraction + guidance injector + budget/policy hooks
fields.validation_plan: Fast: cargo check -p agent-core. Primary: cargo test -p agent-core (provider selection, deterministic guidance merge, budget hook blocks + records). Manual: none. Failure logs: target/test-logs/.
